summary: The implementation comprehensively addresses all five requirements. The backend now includes a UserRole type (Owner, Admin, User, Friend), methods to change roles with proper authorization, and a query to retrieve all users with roles. The frontend displays user roles on the Home Screen via UserRoleBadge in Layout.tsx and provides a full UserStatusManagement component in the admin panel with search, role selection dropdowns, and success/error feedback. Migration logic ensures existing users default to 'user' role.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module (backend/migration.mo) with logic to migrate existing user profiles to include the new role field
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not specify migration logic or handling of existing user data. While practical for deployment, this was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: UserRoleBadge component with icons (Crown, Shield, User, Users) and gradient styling for role visualization
hallucinated_features.reason: The requirement states 'clear visual styling to distinguish between different roles' but does not specify icons, gradient backgrounds, or shadow effects. The implementation goes beyond minimal visual distinction.

hallucinated_features.description: Collapsible UI for User Status Management section in AdminPanel
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-3 requires 'a new section for managing user status' in the admin panel, but does not specify collapsible behavior. The AdminPanel.tsx implements a collapsible trigger with chevron icons.

hallucinated_features.description: Email field added to ProfileSetup component
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not mention email collection or profile setup modifications. ProfileSetup.tsx now collects email in addition to name, storing it as 'name|email' format.
